nasb.text: Alexander the coppersmith did me much harm; the Lord will repay him according to his deeds.

esv.text: Alexander the coppersmith did me great harm; the Lord will repay him according to his deeds.

cnv.text: 銅匠亞歷山大作了許多惡事陷害我，主必按著他所行的報應他。

ccb.text: 铜匠亚历山大做了许多恶事害我，主必按他的所作所为报应他。

csbs.text: 铜匠亚历山大对我做了很多恶事；主将照着他的行为回报他。
